title: MD
biography: Agnes Binagwaho is a Rwandan pediatrician who served as Minister of Health of Rwanda (2011-2016) and transformed the country's healthcare system after the genocide. She is Vice Chancellor of the University of Global Health Equity and a leading voice on health systems strengthening in sub-Saharan Africa.
aiSummary: Agnes Binagwaho is a pediatrics and global health specialist with an H-index of 55 at the University of Global Health Equity. Former Minister of Health of Rwanda who rebuilt the nation's health system. Based in Kigali, Rwanda.

timeline.title: Established Rwanda's national HIV treatment program
timeline.description: Led rollout of antiretroviral therapy across Rwanda

timeline.title: Appointed Minister of Health of Rwanda
timeline.description: Led one of Africa's most successful health system transformations

timeline.title: Founded University of Global Health Equity
timeline.description: Established UGHE to train the next generation of global health leaders

timeline.title: Vice Chancellor of UGHE
timeline.description: Continued building health equity education in partnership with Partners In Health
